tag.v: Step-free to station and stops opposite via controlled crossing.
Route 15 Heritage Routemaster buses not accessible. Step-free to station and stops opposite via controlled crossing.
ウォーターストーンズ
Found on the Eastern Side. This renovation of this fountain cost £2,200; it was reopened in March 2010
former gas-lit Bude Light, converted to electricity
former gas-lit Bude Light, converted to electricity; column converted in 1927 to very small police station
lamp base contains windowed shelter room, locked
former gas-lit Bude Light, converted to electricity
old works tunnel now possibly terminates near here, rest backfilled?
en:Equestrian statue of George IV, Trafalgar Square

Westminster council's street signs say just 'Strand', however 'The Strand' is by far the more common form, including on Westminster council's own website. If you want to change it back, at least change all parts of the road consistently.
特拉法尔加广场;特拉法爾加廣場

Westminster council's street signs say just 'Strand', however 'The Strand' is by far the more common form, including on Westminster council's own website. If you want to change it back, at least change all parts of the road consistently.
en:High Commission of South Africa, London
A new hotel is being built here

To Major General Sir Henry Havelock K.C.B. and his brave companions in arms during the campaign in India, 1857. "Soldiers! Your labours, your privations, your sufferings and your valour will not be forgotten by a grateful country." H. Havelock
Category:Statue of Henry Havelock in Trafalgar Square
en:Statue of Henry Havelock, Trafalgar Square
特拉法尔加广场;特拉法爾加廣場

Works tunnel used to transport soil excavated during construction of Fleet Line station at Charing Cross, formerly installed with narrow guage tracks. May be visitable on certain Hidden London tours

This relationship collects relationships for station models ('buildings and tunnels') for Transport for London to assist with underground navigation and access - please read text at the url below.
